markdown:
#  Export a Snapshot from the Budget Tool 
##  Background 
After creating a snapshot, users can immediately export it to a Comma Separated Values (CSV) file or the Portable Document Format (PDF). The snapshot type available depends on whether you're exporting from the Budget tool's Budget or Forecasting tab.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * To export any project status snapshot created from the Project Status Snapshots tab, 'Read-Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Budget tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Ad Hoc and Project Status Snapshots are available for the Budget tab.
    * Only Ad Hoc Snapshots are available for the Forecasting tab.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Budget Snapshot](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/budget-and-forecast-snapshots-user-guide/create-a-snapshot)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Budget** tool.
  2. Click **Budget** or **Forecasting** tab.
  3. Create or view a snapshot. 
#####  Note
Ad Hoc and Project Status Snapshots are available for the Budget tab. Only Ad Hoc Snapshots are available for the Forecasting tab.
  4. _(Optional)_ Choose the budget view and apply any filtering or grouping options to the snapshot.
  5. Click **Export**.   
![Export Budget Forecast Snapshot](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/101f28a1f2ee79f95bf5e37561243b2e/4b02eac4dbd5aaf1c65e1db287271b5d/export-budget-forecast-snapshot.png?fm=webp)
#####  Note
Because CSV is a flat file format, any applied grouping options are not included in exports to CSV.
  6. Choose one of these options from the menu:
     * **CSV**. This downloads a CSV file to the location configured in your web browser.
     * **PDF**. This opens a PDF version of the file in a new browser window. To download it, use the options available in your web browser's PDF viewer.


## See Also
  * [Export a Snapshot List from the Project Status Snapshots Tab in the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/export-a-snapshot-list-from-the-project-status-snapshots-tab-in-the-budget-tool)
  * [View a Snapshot from the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/view-a-snapshot-from-the-budget-tool)
  * [What is the difference between an ad-hoc snapshot and a project status snapshot?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-an-ad-hoc-snapshot-and-a-project-status-snapshot)
title: Export a Snapshot from the Budget Tool
description: How to export a budget snapshot from a project's Budget tool.
